title: Waratah palettes — pal_waratah
text: Palettes created using waratah anchor colours. Note palettes used plots interpolate anchor colours, allowing palette used number colours (within reason!)

title: Waratah palettes — pal_waratah
text: palette Name palette: default, brand_default, neg_to_pos, greens, teals, blues, purples, fuchsias, reds, oranges, yellows, greys, browns, deeps, lights, warm_colours, cool_colours, colour_blind direction Set -1 reverse order colours palette, 1 original order.

title: Waratah palettes — pal_waratah
code: library(scales)  show_col(pal_waratah()(8)) #> Warning: At most 7 colours are supported by the "default" palette  show_col(pal_waratah("colour_blind")(6))

title: reactable_theme() — reactable_theme
text: reactable_theme()

title: reactable_theme() — reactable_theme
code: reactable_theme(   colour = "blue_01",   title_font = "Public Sans",   base_font = "Public Sans",   base_text_size = 10,   textColor = NULL,   .colours = waratah_colours,   backgroundColor = TRUE,   borderColor = TRUE,   stripedColor = NULL,   ... )

title: reactable_theme() — reactable_theme
text: colour starting colour table. can ophelia_colours (e.g. "blue_01", "green_01", "purple_02"). title_font default title "Public Sans". change different font (e.g. match external publication requirement), simply change desired (e.g. "Times New Roman"). Make sure installed fonts want use device first! base_font default font also "Public Sans". want use different font (e.g. match external publication requirement), simply change desired (e.g. "Arial"). Make sure installed fonts want use device first! base_text_size Base text size. header size relative base text size. textColor can specify text colour like different borderColor stripedColor. .colours Used read waratah_colours. Please leave ! backgroundColor Logical. Can specified TRUE/FALSE. colour off_white #F2F2F2 borderColor colour horizontal lines rows. stripedColor fill colour alternate rows. ... parameters pass reactable::reactableTheme(). See ?reactable::reactableTheme documentation. examples can done reactable, see https://glin.github.io/reactable/articles/cookbook/cookbook.html.

title: reactable_theme() — reactable_theme
text: theme apply reactable object

what: Objects exported from other packages — reexports
title: Objects exported from other packages — reexports
text: objects imported packages. Follow links see documentation. magrittr %>%

title: Waratah colour scales for 'ggplot2' — scale_colour_waratah
text: scales can used ggplot use waratah palettes. _c variants interpolate palette colours continuous gradient.

title: Waratah colour scales for 'ggplot2' — scale_colour_waratah
code: scale_colour_waratah(   name = ggplot2::waiver(),   ...,   palette = "default",   direction = 1,   aesthetics = "colour" )  scale_fill_waratah(   name = ggplot2::waiver(),   ...,   palette = "default",   direction = 1,   aesthetics = "fill" )  scale_colour_waratah_c(   name = ggplot2::waiver(),   ...,   palette = "default",   direction = -1,   values = NULL,   na.value = "grey50",   guide = "colourbar",   aesthetics = "colour" )  scale_fill_waratah_c(   name = ggplot2::waiver(),   ...,   palette = "default",   direction = -1,   values = NULL,   na.value = "grey50",   guide = "colourbar",   aesthetics = "fill" )

title: Waratah colour scales for 'ggplot2' — scale_colour_waratah
text: name, na.value, guide, aesthetics, ... Arguments passed ggplot2::discrete_scale() ggplot2::continuous_scale() control name, limits, breaks, labels forth. palette Name palette: default, brand_default, neg_to_pos, greens, teals, blues, purples, fuchsias, reds, oranges, yellows, greys, browns, deeps, lights, warm_colours, cool_colours, colour_blind direction Set -1 reverse order colours palette, 1 original order. values colours evenly positioned along gradient vector gives position (0 1) anchor colour.

title: theme_waratah() — theme_waratah
text: theme_waratah()

title: theme_waratah() — theme_waratah
code: theme_waratah(   title_font = "Public Sans",   base_font = "Arial",   void = FALSE,   show_grid_lines = TRUE,   base_text_size = 11,   background_colour = TRUE,   .colours = waratah_colours )

title: theme_waratah() — theme_waratah
text: title_font default title \"Public Sans\". change different font (e.g. match external publication requirement), simply change desired (e.g. \"Arial\"). Make sure installed fonts want use device first! base_font default font \"Arial\"). want use different font (e.g. match external publication requirement), simply change desired (e.g. \"Times New Roman\"). Make sure installed fonts want use device first! void Logical (TRUE/FALSE). TRUE, grid lines axes removed. useful creating pie/donut charts. show_grid_lines Logical (TRUE/FALSE). FALSE, grid lines removed axis text retained. base_text_size Base text size pt. relative size title / subtitle text margins derived . background_colour Logical. default (TRUE) adds white colour background line ophelia colour palette. Change FALSE white background. .colours Used read waratah_colours. Please leave !

title: theme_waratah() — theme_waratah
text: object returned. Instead, theme applied ggplot plot.

title: tooltipcss — tooltip_css
text: CSS code required add waratah-styled tooltips interactive graphs created using ggiraph

title: tooltipcss — tooltip_css
code: tooltip_css(   font_family = NULL,   font_size = NULL,   background_color = NULL,   text_color = NULL )

title: tooltipcss — tooltip_css
text: font_family Font family text tooltips (default: "Public Sans") font_size Font size text tooltips (default: "11px") background_color Hover background colour (default: #22272b) text_color Hover text colour (default: #F2F2F2)

title: tooltipcss — tooltip_css
text: character vector containing CSS styles tooltips

title: waratah_colours — waratah_colours
text: Anchor colours used create waratah colour palettes. can also used stand-alone colours (e.g. waratah_colours$blue_01 returns hex code \"#002664\")

title: waratah_colours — waratah_colours
text: list 47 elements

title: waratah_colours — waratah_colours
